name: policy-authoring
description: Reusable policy and requirements authoring skills for building, editing, auditing, rendering, and delivering UC/PR/FN/sub-function and PG/PI policy specs — now 8 skills including preview render/deliver splice, NC-studio upload gates (requirement links, decision-spec axes), and requirement-coverage workflow orchestration.

interface.longDescription: Eight reusable skills for policy and requirements authoring: hierarchy decomposition, naming readability, policy-detail authoring, integrity audit (groups A–L), new-module setup, preview render & delivery splice, NC-studio upload gates (G2 requirement links, G5 decision-spec axes), and requirement-coverage workflow orchestration. The bundled Python tools use a canonical spec JSON and a multi-unit policy_config.json so the workflow can move across project folders and source formats.
defaultPrompt: Use Policy Authoring to set up a new policy module.
Audit this policy spec for ID integrity.
Rewrite these policy details with tables and review flags.
